title: Kerala High Court allows transgender man to preserve his eggs
description: The Kerala High Court on Friday granted relief to a transgender man who challenged a private fertility centre's refusal to provide him services to freeze and store his eggs [Hari Devageeth v Union of India & ors].The private fertility centre had refused him such services on the ground that the Assisted Reproductive Technology (ART) Act, 2021, did not contain any provisions to permit the extension of such services for transgender persons.Justice Shoba Annamma Eapen today permitted the petitio
